titleStmt.title: SII 20.74: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 74. (B.K. No. 2 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 37, Nandana, Kārttika, Puṇṇame, Monday, lunar eclipse. The details correspond to A.D. 1112, November 4, Monday, f.d.t. ·70. But there was no eclipse on that day.

The inscription records a gift, by Daṇḍanāyaka Anantamayya, for the maintenance of the quarter for dancing girls (sūḷe-gēri) constructed by him, attached to the temple of Sōmēśvaradēva at Purigere when his brother-in-law Śrīpatiyarasa was governing the Two-600 division, viz., Beḷvola-300 and Purigere-300. The gift-land was purchased from the Mahājanas of the nagara (i.e. Purigere) and the Gāvuṇḍas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
stuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . ©
tyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraṁ viśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṟithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakasatyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta rābhivriddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . kanda . śrīpatinirmmaḷakīrtti śrīpati parasainyajaḷadhisaṁjātajaya
śrīpati patihitacaritaṁ śrīpatidaṇḍādhināthanesedaṁ dhareyoḷ . parabhūpaṁgartthigoḷḷaḷkidari pugasuradhvaṁsiyirppaṁ
te vidyādharanirppaṁtabdhiyirppaṁtesedu mahimeyiṁdirḻdapaṁ baṁdu mārkoḷgaribhūparbbērppebijjeḍe gabhayacakitarkkāḻgi bennaṭṭiko
lguṁ karedīguṁ pūṇdu tāguṁ śaśiviśadayaśaṁ śrīpatiśrīcamūpa . Aribhūpā ḷaranendu ratnapuradiṁ mattattu beṁkoṇdu
tatkarisandōhamanante beḷgoḍegaḷaṁ bhaṇḍāramaṁ siṁhaviṣṭaramaṁ vājigaḷaṁ viḷāsiniyaraṁ tandaṁ camūvallabhābharaṇaṁ śrīpati mecci
biccaḷipidaṁ cāḷukyacakrēśvaraṁ . Ene negaḻdā daṇḍanāyakananujarttōḷvalada saurya deḷeyoḷ bhīmārjjunarenisidarīśvaradaṇḍa
nāthanuṁ sōvidēvadaṇḍādhipanu . poḍeva siḍilge niḷda ku pāyva geṟaṁke
pēḷimeṁbina kaḍugali suḷisoyyane mārmaleva pōgadidirccuva gaṇḍanā
vanō . paranṛparaṁ paḷaṁcaledu baṁdaḍe vikramacakri taṁnanādarisi viḷāsadiṁ dhavaḷa śaṁkhamanaggada dhāre gāḷeyaṁ birudina nāmamaṁ
kuruḷakāntamanōjjharavākyadalkidaccariyene petta pempinaḷavāraḷavīśvaradaṇḍanāthana . birudaranaṭṭi kolva javananjidaraṁ nijabā
huvajrapaṁjaradoḷagiṭṭu kāva harinandananāśritarāda śiṣṭaraṁ poreva pogarttevetta bali bhāvipoḍītane tānenuttamī dhare mana
moldu baṇnisuvudentu camūpati sōvidēvana . Intu nijagōtraśikhāmaṇiyaṁ dvijavaṁśa bhūṣaṇarumenisi negartte
vaḍedu samadhigatapaṁcama hāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakananta ḻparādhyakṣamānesā
haṇiverggaḍe lōkasahavāsigaḷadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ patthaḷekaraṇaṁ kaṁnaḍasandhivigrahi sēnādhi pati nāmādisamastapraśastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīpatiyarasar beḷvalamūnūṟumaṁ purigeṟemūnūṟuma(ṁ) nanteraḍaṟu
nūṟumaṁ sukhadināḷuttamire . kandaṁ . paramaguṇaratnanenisida siripati daṇḍādhinātha tiḷakane sujanābharaṇana maydunanesedaṁ
patihitanidhi negarddanantadaṇḍādhīśa . śrutigaḷoḷōjevetta sucaritramadāraḷavēka vākyasaṁgatamenisirddudāraguṇamāraḷa
vīśvarapādasēvanācaturavinōdamāraḷavenuttiḷe baṇnipudāgaḷuṁ camūpatiyananta naṁ budhaśukaprakarōtsavasadvasantana [.]
śrutalakṣmībudhasabhāmudritamādudu sujanavritti durjanamukhamudritamādudī jaganmudritamādudu peṁpanantadaṇḍā
dhipana . Adaṭaranāntu kolvadaṭanaṇmidaraṁ baṟikeyva mīrttu mīṟidara naḍurttu hoyya siḍiluddhataraṁ noṇevugrarāhuveṁbu
danene mattanantanoḷanantaparākramanoḷ poḍarppugeyvidiriḍuvoḍḍi nittaripa kāduva meygaliyārddharitriyoḷ .
Anatārātibaḷakke daṇḍadharanirppantirḻdapaṁ kāminījanakēḷīvibhavakke cittabhavanirppa ntirḻdapaṁ śiṣṭasajjanabandhuprakarakke kalpataruvi
rppantirṛdapaṁ daṇḍanāthananantaṁ viḷasaduyaśōdharavadhūkāntaṁ mahībhāgadoḷ . puruṣanidhiyenipanantaṁ dhare nilvinamī svayaṁ
bhu sōmēśvaradēvara munde bhaktiyiṁdaccariyāgire sūḷekēriyaṁ māḍisida . © svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikramakāla
da 37 neya nandana samvatsarada kārttikada puṇname sōmavāra vyatīpāta sōmagrahaṇadandu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ
Anantamayyaṁgaḷ śrī rājadhānipaṭṭaṇaṁ purigeṟeya śrī svayaṁbhu sōmēśvara dēvargge sūḷegēriyaṁ māḍisi Alliya pātra
pāvuḷakkaṁ baṁda sūḷeyarugha(ga)ḷige Antanitarkkaṁ manneyara gāvuṇḍugaḷgaṁ nagara mahājanaṁgaḷgaṁ dharmārtthaṁ prārtthisi drabyanivēdanaṁ geyda
vara kaiyyoḷ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ kālgarccisikoṇḍu sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ sarvva namaśyamāgi paḍedu biṭṭa bhūmiya pramāṇaṁ purada Ī
śānyada deseya manneya voladoḷage purigeṟeya ghaḷeyalu mattar nālvattu Adakke sīme mūḍalu niṭṭūra paḍuvaṇa pola
da mēreya niṟisuṁgallu Agnēyadallu niṭṭūra beḷkanūra polada mēreya mugguḍḍe teṁkalu beḷkanūra polada sīme nairityadalu śaṁkhada basadi
ya beḷkanūra polada mēreya muguḍḍe paḍuvaṁ śaṁkhada basadiya polada mēre vāyabya dalu paḷḷada paḍuvaṇa baduvina kotturoḷa
gaṇa Uḷimukhada kiṁnnarigallu baḍagaṇa mēre Īśānyada niṟisuṁgalliṁge tripuruṣada nilavu . Intī dharmmamaṁ paṭṭaṇada Aśēṣa na
gara mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ manneyaru gāvuṇḍugaḷu Arasugaḷumirḻdu svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvar Ī dharmmamaṁ koṭavargge gaṁge
vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāge Argghyatīrtthamintivu modalāgi puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁ
caratnadoḷkaṭṭisi sāsirvva caturvvēdapāragarappa sabrāhmaṇargge sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu bhayamukhigoṭṭa
phaḷa . Ī dharmmamanaḷidātanā divyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷanitu kavileyumananibarbbāhmaṇarumaṁ tanna mātāpitṛgaḷma
naḷida paṁcamahāpātakanakkuṁ . ślōka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundarāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā
phalaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbiḥ sarvvānētān bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁ
drān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . poṁboḷalakarttuvādicūḍāmaṇi kantheya dēvara putraṁ caṭṭapāryyaṁ pēḷdaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
